name: CITIUS ONCOLOGY, INC.
business: The Company is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative targeted oncology therapies. Its lead product is LYMPHIR, an engineered IL-2 diphtheria toxin fusion protein, for the treatment of patients with persistent or recurrent CTCL, a rare form of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. LYMPHIR was approved by the FDA in August 2024 and launched in December 2025.

exposures.sentence: LYMPHIR is a recombinant DNA-derived fusion protein designed to direct the cytocidal action of diphtheria toxin (DT) to cells which express the IL-2 receptor.

catalysts.sentence: LYMPHIR was approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA) in August 2024 and was launched in December 2025.
LYMPHIR was approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA) in August 2024 and was launched in December 2025.

catalysts.event: Preliminary Phase I trial results anticipated
catalysts.sentence: Preliminary results are anticipated in the first quarter of 2026.
We expect the first commercial sale to occur in the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Addressable U.S. market for LYMPHIR exceeds $400 million
tamClaims.sentence: The Company believes there is an attractive and growing market for LYMPHIR, estimated to exceed $400 million, that is underserved by existing treatments.
